user.title: Connect to Anker Solix F2000
user.description: Select your discovered Anker Solix F2000 power station, or opt to manually input its Bluetooth MAC address.

manual.title: Manual Configuration
manual.description: Enter the physical Bluetooth MAC address of your Anker F2000 power station.

confirm.title: Discovery Settings
confirm.description: Configure the telemetry polling and retry intervals for your discovered device.

error.invalid_mac: The entered MAC address format is invalid. Please format as XX:XX:XX:XX:XX:XX.
error.retry_interval_too_low: Reconnection retry delay must be >= active polling rate.

init.title: Configure Polling and Reconnection Options
init.description: Adjust the telemetry polling rate and the maximum failover reconnection delay for your Anker Solix F2000.

error.retry_interval_too_low: Reconnection retry delay must be >= active polling rate.
